objectives: Set up an efficient development workflow using an integrated development environment software
Write and run basic programs and iterate using debugging and refactoring features
learning_path.title: Programming Foundations and IDE Workflow

objectives: Create and manage repositories with a clean commit history
Use branching and merging to collaborate and manage changes safely
learning_path.title: Git Fundamentals for Version Control

objectives: Implement core data structures and analyze time/space complexity
Apply algorithmic techniques to solve common programming problems
learning_path.title: Data Structures And Algorithms Essentials

objectives: Write SELECT queries with filtering, sorting, joins, and aggregation
Modify data safely using INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE and transactions
learning_path.title: SQL Basics with PostgreSQL/MySQL

objectives: Model entities and relationships and translate them into relational tables
Normalize schemas to reduce redundancy and improve integrity
learning_path.title: Database Design And Normalization

objectives: Explain request/response structure, methods, headers, status codes, and content negotiation
Understand HTTPS goals and how it changes transport and security properties
learning_path.title: HTTP/HTTPS Fundamentals for Web Systems

objectives: Design resource-oriented endpoints with consistent naming and semantics
Define pagination, filtering, error formats, and versioning strategies
learning_path.title: RESTful API Design

objectives: Implement token-based authentication flows and validate tokens correctly
Design authorization rules and enforce them consistently across endpoints
learning_path.title: Authentication And Authorization (Oauth2/Jwt)

objectives: Choose appropriate caching strategies for reads, writes, and computed results
Handle cache invalidation, TTLs, and consistency trade-offs
learning_path.title: Caching with Redis/Memcached

objectives: Identify concurrency hazards and apply safe patterns for shared state
Design concurrent workloads for responsiveness and throughput
learning_path.title: Concurrency And Multithreading in Application Development

objectives: Apply use software design patterns to structure code for maintainability
Select appropriate software UI design patterns for common interaction flows
learning_path.title: Use Software Design Patterns in Web Programming

objectives: Create and export UI assets using graphics editor software
Integrate visual assets into a consistent interface using software UI design patterns
learning_path.title: UI Asset Creation and Graphics Workflow

matched_occupation.description: User interface developers implement, code, document and maintain the interface of a software system by using front-end development technologies.
matched_occupation.label: user interface developer
